name: The youth days we will never forget
description:
A group of friends that you're a part of, always love to tease each other and hanging out, enjoying youth together and all the emotions, even sad ones

=================================

Beautiful highschool days that i wish i can go back. I hate college (〒_〒)

Mostly inspired by the novel "chitose kun wa ramune bin no naka". I guess that's obvious cuz, look at the image.

Highschool would be the best but i want the limitless tag for...if you know, you know stuff. So, i guess i'll let it be college

(Sorry for bad english, if anyone actuality read this yapping type shi)

I'll make a entrance message for each char in the group as routes and hopefully that will make you immerse with that char the most. There will be one extra so that you will meet them all at once so that you get to decide if u like

Wait, i think i can just let it be highschool right? Or just not mentioning it at all or stated it as Academy =]]

This is my first time trying a multiple bot, i don't want to describe them too detail so that the bot can work more precisely. Maybe i'll make separate bot if this got enough attention (i doubt that). Please tell me what i could change to improve(if you want)

Yes i dont put picture, there is two purposes. 1 is because i want you to imagine them, 2 is because im lazy af
